omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Our Company jointly use Personal Information collected by customers, as follows:

(1) Information subject to Joint Use:
- All the information related to customer's Personal Information Our Company has
collected.
(2) Who jointly use:
- Shueisha and its group companies. To see the list of Shueisha's group companies,
please see here.
(3) Purpose of Processing:
- As stated in “Purpose of Processing Personal Information” in “SHUEISHA Privacy
Guideline."
(4) Name of Person in Charge of Control of Personal Information Subject to Joint Use
- Shueisha Inc.:
